name: Ham & Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beans; drain.
2. In a large saucepan combine the beans and 4 cups water.
3. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
Simmer, uncovered, for 2 minutes.
4. Remove from heat; cover and let stand for 1 hour. (Alternatively, skip boiling the water and soak the beans overnight in a covered pan.)
5. Drain and rinse the beans.
6. In the same pan stir together the beans, 4 cups fresh water, celery, carrots, onion, ham, bouillon granules, thyme, bay leaves, and pepper.
7. Bring to boiling; reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 1 1/4 hours or until the beans are tender.
8. Discard bay leaves.
9. Using a fork, slightly mash the beans against the side of the saucepan to slightly thicken the soup.
Makes 4 servings. 247 calories per serving - 2 grams fat per serving.
